page: Microsoft Azure DC32s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the DCSv3 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 2.8 GHz. The processor includes a cache hierarchy consisting of 48 KB L1d cache, 1 MB L2 cache, and 48 MB L3 cache. It supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512 Foundation, AVX-512 Vector Neural Network Instructions, and cryptographic acceleration via AES, VAES, and SHA extensions.

The server is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core density of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include any bundled local storage, requiring external Premium Storage volumes for persistent data. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance. The hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe drives but benefit from a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio.

In benchmark evaluations, the DC32s_v3 demonstrates strong multi-threaded performance, highlighted by a bzip3 decompression rate of 276.82 GB/sec and a Geekbench multi-core score of 17321.0. Cryptographic capabilities are robust, with the Passmark CPU encryption test reaching 36894.88. Database operations are also highly efficient, scoring 25003.69 in Passmark database tests, alongside a static web serving throughput of 47.09 GB/sec. However, the system exhibits limitations in large-scale AI tasks, with LLM text generation for a 70B model performing weakly at 2.73 tokens/sec. This server is best suited for memory-intensive database operations, multi-threaded data processing, secure cryptographic workloads, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure DC32s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the DCSv3 family, built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 2.8 GHz, supported by 256.0 GB of RAM. The instance does not include local storage, relying on Premium Storage compatibility. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-threaded performance, including a bzip3 decompression rate of 276.82 GB/sec, a Passmark CPU encryption score of 36894.88, and highly efficient database operations scoring 25003.69. Conversely, it shows weaker performance in large-scale LLM text generation. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive database workloads, secure cryptographic applications, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC32s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and strong multi-threaded performance for database and cryptographic workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC32s_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 32 Intel Xeon cores and 256 GB RAM, ideal for database and cryptographic workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine with dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high-capacity RAM for secure, multi-threaded database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs at 2.8 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing a high 8.0 GB per core resource density
Strong multi-threaded performance in bzip3 decompression and Geekbench multi-core benchmarks
Excellent cryptographic and database execution speeds based on Passmark testing
No bundled local storage, requiring external Premium Storage configuration
Well-suited for memory-intensive databases, secure computing, and web serving
